testcase.name: test_copyright
testcase.failure: test/test_copyright.py:23: in test_copyright assert rc == 0, 'Found errors' E AssertionError: Found errors E assert 1 == 0

testcase.name: test_flake8

failure.message: AssertionError: Found 18 code style errors / warnings: ./launch/dobot_homing.launch.py:7:1: E302 expected 2 blank lines, found 1 ./launch/dobot_homing.launch.py:21:5: E122 continuation line missing indentation or outdented ./launch/dobot_homing.launch.py:23:32: E203 whitespace before ',' ./launch/dobot_homing.launch.py:26:5: E122 continuation line missing indentation or outdented ./launch/dobot_homing.launch.py:28:1: W391 blank line at end of file ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:11:1: E303 too many blank lines (3) ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:15:100: E501 line too long (108 > 99 characters) ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:16:100: E501 line too long (143 > 99 characters) ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:17:100: E501 line too long (263 > 99 characters) ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:17:188: E251 unexpected spaces around keyword / parameter equals ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:17:190: E251 unexpected spaces around keyword / parameter equals ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:18:100: E501 line too long (111 > 99 characters) ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:23:5: E303 too many blank lines (2) ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:27:100: E501 line too long (105 > 99 characters) ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:34:5: E303 too many blank lines (3) ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:36:34: W291 trailing whitespace ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:46:1: E303 too many blank lines (4) ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:57:11: W292 no newline at end of file assert 1 == 0

testcase.failure: test/test_flake8.py:23: in test_flake8 assert rc == 0, \ E AssertionError: Found 18 code style errors / warnings: E ./launch/dobot_homing.launch.py:7:1: E302 expected 2 blank lines, found 1 E ./launch/dobot_homing.launch.py:21:5: E122 continuation line missing indentation or outdented E ./launch/dobot_homing.launch.py:23:32: E203 whitespace before ',' E ./launch/dobot_homing.launch.py:26:5: E122 continuation line missing indentation or outdented E ./launch/dobot_homing.launch.py:28:1: W391 blank line at end of file E ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:11:1: E303 too many blank lines (3) E ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:15:100: E501 line too long (108 > 99 characters) E ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:16:100: E501 line too long (143 > 99 characters) E ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:17:100: E501 line too long (263 > 99 characters) E ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:17:188: E251 unexpected spaces around keyword / parameter equals E ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:17:190: E251 unexpected spaces around keyword / parameter equals E ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:18:100: E501 line too long (111 > 99 characters) E ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:23:5: E303 too many blank lines (2) E ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:27:100: E501 line too long (105 > 99 characters) E ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:34:5: E303 too many blank lines (3) E ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:36:34: W291 trailing whitespace E ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:46:1: E303 too many blank lines (4) E ./dobot_homing/homing_server.py:57:11: W292 no newline at end of file E assert 1 == 0
